_schema.drafts: Queue of generated email drafts awaiting approval, scheduled, or sent. Appended by marketing-generate-daily.js, mutated by the admin UI, drained by marketing-send.js.

draftShape.subject: string
draftShape.innerHtml: string — body without the wrapping container/footer (for editing)
draftShape.segment: Subscribed | Wine Club | Golf | Event Attendees | All
draftShape.regenerationCount: number — how many times Redo was used
draftShape.context: object — what fed the prompt (event id, band id, weather, etc.)
draftShape.model: string — which AI model produced this draft

_schema.history: Sent or rejected drafts older than 30 days, moved here for archival lookup.

drafts.subject: The dish we keep putting back on the menu
drafts.htmlBody:
THE QUARRY

Some dishes earn a permanent place — this is one of them.

Our pan-seared duck breast comes to the table with a crisp, rendered skin giving way to meat that's rosy and tender at the center. It sits over a celery root purée that's silky without being heavy, finished with a tart cherry reduction and a scattering of toasted hazelnuts for bite. It's the kind of plate that makes the table go quiet for a moment.

Available now through the end of May, while the season holds. We'd recommend pairing it with a glass of our current Willamette Valley Pinot Noir — the kitchen had exactly that in mind when they built the dish.

Reserve Your Table

We'll see you at the table,
The Quarry

The Quarry · 3960 Highway Z, New Melle, MO 63385
thequarrystl.com · Facebook

drafts.subject: This week at The Quarry — May 5–11
drafts.htmlBody:
THE QUARRY
Drinks  ·  Bites  ·  Live Music  ·  Golf

THIS WEEK AT THE QUARRY

Your week, May 5–11

We're open Wednesday through Sunday and always glad to see you — but this week's lineup is still coming together, and we don't want to send you a placeholder where a great show should be.

Check back soon. We'll have live music, good food, and everything else worth knowing about in your inbox before the weekend arrives.

In the meantime, the kitchen is ready, the wine list is deep, and the Hole-In-One Golf bays are open. No reservations needed for dining — just walk in and find your seat.

See you soon,
The Quarry

drafts.subject: {firstName}, your May wines are ready to pick up
drafts.htmlBody:
THE QUARRY
Drinks  ·  Bites  ·  Live Music  ·  Golf

MAY WINE CLUB RELEASE

Your May Selections Are In

{firstName}, your May release is ready and waiting. We've curated two bottles this month that lean into the season — lighter on their feet, longer on the finish.

This Month's Picks

We'll have your full tasting notes ready at pickup, but here's the short version: one white that drinks like a warm afternoon, and a red that's been waiting for a reason to open early. Both are worth lingering over.

When to Pick Up

  • We're open Wednesday through Sunday
  • Pick up at the host stand — we'll have your order ready
  • Stay for a glass and let us walk you through the pairings

As always, your member discount applies to any additional bottles you'd like to take home. Ask your server about what's pouring well right now — the bar team has strong opinions this month.

See you soon,
The Quarry

drafts.subject: The dish we can't stop talking about
drafts.htmlBody:
THE QUARRY
Drinks  ·  Bites  ·  Live Music  ·  Golf

Menu Spotlight

The Kind of Dish That Makes You Slow Down

Some plates arrive and you just know — this one's worth savoring. Our pan-seared duck breast is exactly that: a deep mahogany crust giving way to rose-pink, tender meat, finished with a cherry-port reduction that walks the line between sweet and earthy in all the right ways.

It comes plated over a smooth celery root purée, with a handful of crispy shallots adding just enough texture to keep every bite interesting. It's the kind of entrée that makes a Wednesday night feel like a special occasion.

No reservations needed for dinner — just walk in, find a seat, and let us take it from there.

See you soon,
The Quarry

THE QUARRY
Drinks  ·  Bites  ·  Live Music  ·  Golf

THIS WEEK AT THE QUARRY

May 12–18, 2026

We're putting the finishing touches on this week's lineup and will have details for you shortly. In the meantime, we're open Wednesday through Sunday — walk in, find a seat, and let us take care of the rest.

No reservations needed for dining. If you're planning something bigger — a private party, a corporate dinner, a celebration worth remembering — we'd love to help you put it together.

Check our events page for the latest updates as the week shapes up.

See you soon,

drafts.subject: This week at The Quarry — May 26–31
drafts.htmlBody:
THE QUARRY
Drinks  ·  Bites  ·  Live Music  ·  Golf

THIS WEEK AT THE QUARRY

A Quiet Week to Simply Come In

Sometimes the best nights out are the unscheduled ones. We don't have special events lined up this week — just good food, a full wine list, and the kind of atmosphere that makes a Wednesday feel like a Friday.

We're open Wednesday through Sunday, no reservations needed for dining. Walk in, find a seat, and let the week slow down a little.

Always On

  • A kitchen turning out dishes worth the drive to New Melle
  • A wine bar stocked with bottles to suit any mood or occasion
  • Hole-In-One Golf for a round before or after dinner
  • Live music most weekends — check back soon as we update the calendar

Planning something bigger? We book private events, weddings, and corporate gatherings. Learn more about private events.

See you soon,
The Quarry
